sn23.21:1.1:
1
At Sāvatthī. Sitting to one side, the Venerable Radha said to the Blessed One: "Venerable sir, it is said, ‘subject to arising, subject to arising.’ What now, venerable sir, is subject to arising?"
sn23.21:1.2: "Form, Radha, is subject to arising. Feeling … Perception … Volitional formations … Consciousness is subject to arising. Seeing thus … He understands: ’ … there is no more for this state of being.’"
